---
title: "ArviZ Stats Summary Quarto Test"
format:
  html: default
  pdf: default
---

## Testing the SummaryDataFrame Display Engine

This notebook verifies that our `SummaryDataFrame` subclass routes its formatted output correctly through Quarto's multi-format publishing pipeline.

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
from arviz_stats.summary import SummaryDataFrame

# 1. Create dummy data and format map
data = {
    "mean": [0.123456, -1.987654],
    "r_hat": [1.001234, 1.056789]
}
fmt_map = {
    "mean": {"mu_1": "0.123", "tau": "-1.988"},
    "r_hat": {"mu_1": "1.00", "tau": "1.06"}
}

# 2. Instantiate our custom DataFrame
summary = SummaryDataFrame(data, index=["mu_1", "tau"], fmt_map=fmt_map)

# 3. Output the object directly so Quarto intercepts its rich representations
summary
```
